events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 32 Begins + FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
events.note: The knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off with the Round of 32, featuring 48 teams competing for the ultimate prize in football. Matches are scheduled throughout the day, with the first match at 8:00 PM local time. The Czech national team is not participating in this round, but the tournament's progression is of significant interest to Czech football fans. Combined with Czech national team match: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico. Czech national team match at a major world football tournament. Treat as the strongest Czech-relevant weekly sports storyline and keep visuals symbolic with no official logos, badges, player likenesses, or protected tournament identity.
events.marketing_angle: personal greeting before a big Czech national team match
events.why_selected: Major world tournament combined with a Czech national team match so the topic is not split into duplicate generic and Czech-match entries.

events.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content. Use hopeful, supportive language and avoid fearmongering, shock visuals, or graphic imagery.
events.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support

events.title: Mystic Sk8 Cup 2026
events.note: The 31st edition of the Mystic Sk8 Cup takes place at the Mystic Skatepark Štvanice in Prague from June 26 to 28. This premier skateboarding event attracts over 200 top skateboarders from around the world, offering thrilling competitions and a vibrant atmosphere. The event is complemented by concerts and a rich accompanying program, making it a highlight for sports and music fans alike.
events.marketing_angle: Showcase the excitement and energy of the Mystic Sk8 Cup, featuring dynamic skateboarding action and the festival's lively atmosphere.
events.why_selected: The Mystic Sk8 Cup is a significant event in the Czech skateboarding calendar, drawing international attention and offering engaging content for sports enthusiasts.

events.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
events.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language. No hype, no sensationalism, and no disturbing imagery.
events.marketing_angle: respectful remembrance for a Czech audience
events.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day in the target week; it should be included with respectful memorial tone rather than ignored.

events.title: Ignis Brunensis Fireworks Festival
events.note: The Ignis Brunensis festival in Brno begins on June 27, featuring an international artistic fireworks competition and drone light shows. This year's event celebrates the 150th fireworks display in the festival's history and the 80th anniversary of the Brno City Transport Company's boat service on the lake. The festival runs from June 27 to July 4, offering a spectacular visual experience for attendees.
events.marketing_angle: Highlight the dazzling fireworks and innovative drone light shows, emphasizing the festival's rich history and cultural significance.
events.why_selected: Ignis Brunensis is a major cultural event in the Czech Republic, offering visually captivating content that resonates with a wide audience.

events.title: Ladies European Tour: Czech Ladies Open
events.note: The Czech Ladies Open, part of the Ladies European Tour, takes place from June 26 to 28 at the Beroun Golf Club. This prestigious golf tournament features top female golfers competing for the championship title, attracting significant attention from sports fans and media alike.
events.marketing_angle: Capture the elegance and precision of women's golf, showcasing the tournament's competitive spirit and the scenic beauty of the Beroun Golf Club.
events.why_selected: The Czech Ladies Open is a notable event in the Czech sports calendar, offering high-quality content for sports enthusiasts.

events.title: Mighty Sounds Festival: Vosto5 Performance
events.note: The Mighty Sounds Festival in Prague features a performance by the band Vosto5 on June 28 at 4:00 PM. This event is part of a larger festival celebrating music and culture, offering a vibrant atmosphere and a diverse lineup of artists.
events.marketing_angle: Highlight the energetic performance of Vosto5, capturing the festival's lively spirit and the joy of live music.
events.why_selected: The Mighty Sounds Festival is a popular cultural event in Prague, offering engaging content for music and festival enthusiasts.
